{"step_by_step_thinking": "The question asks about the appropriate duration for suctioning tracheal secretions. Document [24] also notes that 'a brief, 10-second suction duration is typically recommended' to avoid mucosal damage and prolonged hypoxia. While option A (10-15 seconds) includes the recommended range, the most consistent and specific guidance from multiple sources is a duration of 10 seconds or less.
